intro: A disclosed simulated walk for App Review. Location and progress are simulated and not saved.

stops.clue: Find the demo kiosk with the numbered placard.
stops.description: A generic demonstration marker used only to show the arrival flow.
stops.reason: The task is observable: locate the marked demo kiosk.
stops.lore_hook: This fictional marker exists only inside the App Review demonstration route.
stops.quest_prompt: Observe the numbered placard on the demo kiosk.
hints: Look for the generic kiosk label.
The simulated walk button moves closer to the placard.

place.name: Demo Kiosk
place.lore: Demo Kiosk is a fictional review stop. It does not assert a real-world field verification.

stops.clue: Find the demo mural panel with the simple pattern.
stops.description: A generic demonstration panel used only to show the next-stop flow.
stops.reason: The task is observable: locate the patterned demo panel.
stops.lore_hook: This fictional panel keeps the review route generic and non-authoritative.
stops.quest_prompt: Observe the pattern on the demo mural panel.
hints: Look for the plain patterned panel.
The simulated walk checkpoints approach the panel in fixed steps.

place.name: Demo Mural Panel
place.lore: Demo Mural Panel is a fictional review stop. It is not production content.

stops.clue: Find the demo fountain rail with the square marker.
stops.description: A generic demonstration rail used only to show completion and recap.
stops.reason: The task is observable: locate the square marker on the demo rail.
stops.lore_hook: This fictional rail is bundled solely for App Review demonstration.
stops.quest_prompt: Observe the square marker on the demo fountain rail.
hints: Look for the square demo marker.
The final simulated checkpoint enters the unchanged 50 meter geofence.

place.name: Demo Fountain Rail
place.lore: Demo Fountain Rail is a fictional review stop. It does not enter the production content bank.
